en.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Enable or disable live diff globally for all buffers
en.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Enable or disable live diff for the current buffer (overrides the global setting)
en.cmd.vs_head_desc: Diff this buffer against its file at git HEAD
en.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Diff this buffer against the file content currently on disk
en.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Diff this buffer against the file at a chosen git branch or ref
en.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: Diff this buffer against origin/HEAD (falls back to main, then master)
en.cmd.refresh_desc: Re-fetch the reference and recompute the diff for the current buffer
en.cmd.set_default_desc: Set the default diff mode for new buffers (head, disk, or branch:<ref>)
en.status.buffer_enabled: Live Diff: enabled for this buffer
en.status.buffer_disabled: Live Diff: disabled for this buffer
en.status.mode_disk: Live Diff: comparing against file on disk
en.status.too_large: Live Diff: file too large for live diff
en.status.bad_default: Live Diff: invalid mode (use head, disk, or branch:<ref>)

cs.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Zapnout nebo vypnout živý diff globálně pro všechny buffery
cs.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Zapnout nebo vypnout živý diff pro aktuální buffer (přepíše globální nastavení)
cs.cmd.vs_head_desc: Porovnat tento buffer s verzí souboru v git HEAD
cs.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Porovnat tento buffer s obsahem souboru aktuálně na disku
cs.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Porovnat tento buffer s verzí souboru ve vybrané git větvi nebo referenci
cs.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: Porovnat tento buffer s origin/HEAD (záloha main, poté master)
cs.cmd.refresh_desc: Znovu načíst referenci a přepočítat diff pro aktuální buffer
cs.cmd.set_default_desc: Nastavit výchozí režim diffu pro nové buffery (head, disk nebo branch:<ref>)
cs.status.no_file: Živý Diff: Žádný soubor není otevřen
cs.status.buffer_enabled: Živý Diff: zapnut pro tento buffer
cs.status.buffer_disabled: Živý Diff: vypnut pro tento buffer
cs.status.mode_disk: Živý Diff: porovnávám se souborem na disku
cs.status.too_large: Živý Diff: soubor je příliš velký pro živý diff
cs.status.bad_default: Živý Diff: neplatný režim (použijte head, disk nebo branch:<ref>)

de.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Live-Diff global für alle Puffer aktivieren oder deaktivieren
de.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Live-Diff für den aktuellen Puffer aktivieren oder deaktivieren (überschreibt die globale Einstellung)
de.cmd.vs_head_desc: Diesen Puffer mit der Datei im git-HEAD vergleichen
de.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Diesen Puffer mit dem aktuell auf der Festplatte gespeicherten Dateiinhalt vergleichen
de.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Diesen Puffer mit der Datei in einem gewählten git-Branch oder einer Referenz vergleichen
de.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: Diesen Puffer mit origin/HEAD vergleichen (Rückfall auf main, dann master)
de.cmd.refresh_desc: Referenz neu laden und Diff für den aktuellen Puffer neu berechnen
de.cmd.set_default_desc: Standardmäßigen Diff-Modus für neue Puffer festlegen (head, disk oder branch:<ref>)
de.status.mode_disk: Live-Diff: Vergleich mit Datei auf der Festplatte
de.status.too_large: Live-Diff: Datei zu groß für Live-Diff
de.status.bad_default: Live-Diff: ungültiger Modus (head, disk oder branch:<ref> verwenden)

es.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Activar o desactivar el diff en vivo globalmente para todos los búferes
es.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Activar o desactivar el diff en vivo para el búfer actual (anula la configuración global)
es.cmd.vs_head_desc: Comparar este búfer con el archivo en git HEAD
es.cmd.vs_disk: Diff en vivo: vs Disco (cambios sin guardar)
es.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Comparar este búfer con el contenido del archivo actualmente en disco
es.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Comparar este búfer con el archivo en una rama o referencia git elegida
es.cmd.vs_default_branch: Diff en vivo: vs Rama predeterminada
es.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: Comparar este búfer con origin/HEAD (recurre a main, luego master)
es.cmd.refresh_desc: Volver a obtener la referencia y recalcular el diff para el búfer actual
es.cmd.set_default: Diff en vivo: Establecer modo predeterminado...
es.cmd.set_default_desc: Establecer el modo de diff predeterminado para nuevos búferes (head, disk o branch:<ref>)
es.status.no_file: Diff en vivo: Ningún archivo abierto
es.status.buffer_enabled: Diff en vivo: activado para este búfer
es.status.buffer_disabled: Diff en vivo: desactivado para este búfer
es.status.mode_head: Diff en vivo: comparando contra HEAD
es.status.mode_disk: Diff en vivo: comparando contra archivo en disco
es.status.too_large: Diff en vivo: archivo demasiado grande para diff en vivo
es.status.bad_default: Diff en vivo: modo inválido (use head, disk o branch:<ref>)
es.status.default_set: Diff en vivo: modo predeterminado actualizado

fr.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Activer ou désactiver le diff en direct globalement pour tous les tampons
fr.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Activer ou désactiver le diff en direct pour le tampon actuel (remplace le réglage global)
fr.cmd.vs_head_desc: Comparer ce tampon au fichier dans HEAD git
fr.cmd.vs_disk: Diff en direct : vs Disque (modifications non enregistrées)
fr.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Comparer ce tampon au contenu du fichier actuellement sur disque
fr.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Comparer ce tampon au fichier dans une branche ou référence git choisie
fr.cmd.vs_default_branch: Diff en direct : vs Branche par défaut
fr.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: Comparer ce tampon à origin/HEAD (repli sur main, puis master)
fr.cmd.refresh_desc: Recharger la référence et recalculer le diff pour le tampon actuel
fr.cmd.set_default: Diff en direct : Définir le mode par défaut...
fr.cmd.set_default_desc: Définir le mode de diff par défaut pour les nouveaux tampons (head, disk ou branch:<ref>)
fr.prompt.default_mode: Mode par défaut (head, disk ou branch:<ref>)
fr.status.no_file: Diff en direct : Aucun fichier ouvert
fr.status.buffer_enabled: Diff en direct : activé pour ce tampon
fr.status.buffer_disabled: Diff en direct : désactivé pour ce tampon
fr.status.mode_head: Diff en direct : comparaison avec HEAD
fr.status.mode_disk: Diff en direct : comparaison avec le fichier sur disque
fr.status.too_large: Diff en direct : fichier trop volumineux pour un diff en direct
fr.status.bad_default: Diff en direct : mode invalide (utilisez head, disk ou branch:<ref>)
fr.status.default_set: Diff en direct : mode par défaut mis à jour

it.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Attiva o disattiva il diff in tempo reale globalmente per tutti i buffer
it.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Attiva o disattiva il diff in tempo reale per il buffer corrente (sovrascrive l'impostazione globale)
it.cmd.vs_head: Diff in tempo reale: vs HEAD
it.cmd.vs_head_desc: Confronta questo buffer con il file su git HEAD
it.cmd.vs_disk: Diff in tempo reale: vs Disco (modifiche non salvate)
it.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Confronta questo buffer con il contenuto del file attualmente su disco
it.cmd.vs_branch: Diff in tempo reale: vs Ramo...
it.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Confronta questo buffer con il file su un ramo o riferimento git scelto
it.cmd.vs_default_branch: Diff in tempo reale: vs Ramo predefinito
it.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: Confronta questo buffer con origin/HEAD (ripiego su main, poi master)
it.cmd.refresh_desc: Ricarica il riferimento e ricalcola il diff per il buffer corrente
it.cmd.set_default: Diff in tempo reale: Imposta modalità predefinita...
it.cmd.set_default_desc: Imposta la modalità di diff predefinita per i nuovi buffer (head, disk o branch:<ref>)
it.status.no_file: Diff in tempo reale: Nessun file aperto
it.status.global_enabled: Diff in tempo reale: attivato globalmente
it.status.global_disabled: Diff in tempo reale: disattivato globalmente
it.status.buffer_enabled: Diff in tempo reale: attivato per questo buffer
it.status.buffer_disabled: Diff in tempo reale: disattivato per questo buffer
it.status.mode_head: Diff in tempo reale: confronto con HEAD
it.status.mode_disk: Diff in tempo reale: confronto con il file su disco
it.status.mode_branch: Diff in tempo reale: confronto con %{ref}
it.status.refreshed: Diff in tempo reale: riferimento aggiornato
it.status.too_large: Diff in tempo reale: file troppo grande per il diff in tempo reale
it.status.bad_default: Diff in tempo reale: modalità non valida (usa head, disk o branch:<ref>)
it.status.default_set: Diff in tempo reale: modalità predefinita aggiornata

ja.cmd.toggle_global: ライブ差分: 切り替え (グローバル)
ja.cmd.toggle_global_desc: すべてのバッファでライブ差分をグローバルに有効化または無効化
ja.cmd.toggle_buffer: ライブ差分: 切り替え (バッファ)
ja.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: 現在のバッファのライブ差分を有効化または無効化 (グローバル設定を上書き)
ja.cmd.vs_head: ライブ差分: HEADと比較
ja.cmd.vs_head_desc: このバッファを git HEAD のファイルと比較
ja.cmd.vs_disk: ライブ差分: ディスクと比較 (未保存の変更)
ja.cmd.vs_disk_desc: このバッファを現在ディスクにあるファイル内容と比較
ja.cmd.vs_branch: ライブ差分: ブランチと比較...
ja.cmd.vs_branch_desc: このバッファを指定した git ブランチまたはリファレンスのファイルと比較
ja.cmd.vs_default_branch: ライブ差分: デフォルトブランチと比較
ja.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: このバッファを origin/HEAD と比較 (フォールバック: main、次に master)
ja.cmd.refresh_desc: リファレンスを再取得し、現在のバッファの差分を再計算
ja.cmd.set_default: ライブ差分: デフォルトモードを設定...
ja.cmd.set_default_desc: 新規バッファの既定の差分モードを設定 (head、disk、または branch:<ref>)
ja.prompt.branch: ブランチまたはリファレンス
ja.prompt.default_mode: デフォルトモード (head、disk、または branch:<ref>)
ja.status.no_file: ライブ差分: ファイルが開かれていません
ja.status.global_enabled: ライブ差分: グローバルに有効
ja.status.global_disabled: ライブ差分: グローバルに無効
ja.status.buffer_enabled: ライブ差分: このバッファで有効
ja.status.buffer_disabled: ライブ差分: このバッファでは無効
ja.status.mode_head: ライブ差分: HEAD と比較中
ja.status.mode_disk: ライブ差分: ディスク上のファイルと比較中
ja.status.mode_branch: ライブ差分: %{ref} と比較中
ja.status.refreshed: ライブ差分: リファレンスを更新しました
ja.status.too_large: ライブ差分: ファイルが大きすぎます
ja.status.bad_default: ライブ差分: 無効なモード (head、disk、または branch:<ref> を使用)
ja.status.default_set: ライブ差分: デフォルトモードを更新しました

ko.cmd.toggle_global_desc: 모든 버퍼에 대해 라이브 diff 전역 활성화 또는 비활성화
ko.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: 현재 버퍼의 라이브 diff 활성화 또는 비활성화 (전역 설정보다 우선)
ko.cmd.vs_head_desc: 이 버퍼를 git HEAD의 파일과 비교
ko.cmd.vs_disk: 라이브 Diff: 디스크와 비교 (저장되지 않은 변경)
ko.cmd.vs_disk_desc: 이 버퍼를 현재 디스크에 있는 파일 내용과 비교
ko.cmd.vs_branch_desc: 이 버퍼를 선택한 git 브랜치 또는 참조의 파일과 비교
ko.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: 이 버퍼를 origin/HEAD와 비교 (대체: main, 그다음 master)
ko.cmd.refresh_desc: 참조를 다시 가져와 현재 버퍼의 diff를 재계산
ko.cmd.set_default_desc: 새 버퍼의 기본 diff 모드 설정 (head, disk, 또는 branch:<ref>)
ko.status.mode_disk: 라이브 Diff: 디스크의 파일과 비교 중
ko.status.too_large: 라이브 Diff: 파일이 너무 커서 라이브 diff 불가
ko.status.bad_default: 라이브 Diff: 잘못된 모드 (head, disk, 또는 branch:<ref> 사용)

pt-BR.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Ativar ou desativar o diff ao vivo globalmente para todos os buffers
pt-BR.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Ativar ou desativar o diff ao vivo para o buffer atual (substitui a configuração global)
pt-BR.cmd.vs_head_desc: Comparar este buffer com o arquivo no git HEAD
pt-BR.cmd.vs_disk: Diff ao vivo: vs Disco (alterações não salvas)
pt-BR.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Comparar este buffer com o conteúdo do arquivo atualmente em disco
pt-BR.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Comparar este buffer com o arquivo em um branch ou referência git escolhido
pt-BR.cmd.vs_default_branch: Diff ao vivo: vs Branch padrão
pt-BR.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: Comparar este buffer com origin/HEAD (recorre a main, depois master)
pt-BR.cmd.refresh_desc: Recarregar a referência e recalcular o diff para o buffer atual
pt-BR.cmd.set_default: Diff ao vivo: Definir modo padrão...
pt-BR.cmd.set_default_desc: Definir o modo de diff padrão para novos buffers (head, disk ou branch:<ref>)
pt-BR.status.no_file: Diff ao vivo: Nenhum arquivo aberto
pt-BR.status.buffer_enabled: Diff ao vivo: ativado para este buffer
pt-BR.status.buffer_disabled: Diff ao vivo: desativado para este buffer
pt-BR.status.mode_head: Diff ao vivo: comparando com HEAD
pt-BR.status.mode_disk: Diff ao vivo: comparando com arquivo em disco
pt-BR.status.too_large: Diff ao vivo: arquivo muito grande para diff ao vivo
pt-BR.status.bad_default: Diff ao vivo: modo inválido (use head, disk ou branch:<ref>)
pt-BR.status.default_set: Diff ao vivo: modo padrão atualizado

ru.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Включить или отключить живой diff глобально для всех буферов
ru.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Включить или отключить живой diff для текущего буфера (переопределяет глобальную настройку)
ru.cmd.vs_head_desc: Сравнить этот буфер с файлом в git HEAD
ru.cmd.vs_disk_desc: Сравнить этот буфер с содержимым файла, находящимся сейчас на диске
ru.cmd.vs_branch_desc: Сравнить этот буфер с файлом в выбранной git-ветке или ссылке

ru.cmd.refresh_desc: Перезагрузить эталон и пересчитать diff для текущего буфера
ru.cmd.set_default: Живой Diff: Установить режим по умолчанию...
ru.cmd.set_default_desc: Установить режим diff по умолчанию для новых буферов (head, disk или branch:<ref>)
ru.prompt.default_mode: Режим по умолчанию (head, disk или branch:<ref>)

ru.status.buffer_disabled: Живой Diff: отключён для этого буфера
ru.status.mode_disk: Живой Diff: сравнение с файлом на диске
ru.status.too_large: Живой Diff: файл слишком большой для живого diff
ru.status.bad_default: Живой Diff: недопустимый режим (используйте head, disk или branch:<ref>)
ru.status.default_set: Живой Diff: режим по умолчанию обновлён

th.cmd.toggle_global: Diff สด: สลับ (ทั่วโลก)
th.cmd.toggle_global_desc: เปิดหรือปิด diff สดทั่วทั้งหมดสำหรับทุกบัฟเฟอร์
th.cmd.toggle_buffer: Diff สด: สลับ (บัฟเฟอร์)

th.cmd.vs_head: Diff สด: เทียบกับ HEAD

th.cmd.vs_disk: Diff สด: เทียบกับดิสก์ (การเปลี่ยนแปลงที่ยังไม่ได้บันทึก)

th.cmd.vs_branch: Diff สด: เทียบกับสาขา...

th.cmd.set_default: Diff สด: ตั้งโหมดเริ่มต้น...

th.prompt.branch: สาขาหรือการอ้างอิง
th.prompt.default_mode: โหมดเริ่มต้น (head, disk หรือ branch:<ref>)
th.status.no_file: Diff สด: ไม่มีไฟล์เปิดอยู่
th.status.global_enabled: Diff สด: เปิดใช้งานทั่วโลก
th.status.global_disabled: Diff สด: ปิดใช้งานทั่วโลก
th.status.buffer_enabled: Diff สด: เปิดใช้งานสำหรับบัฟเฟอร์นี้
th.status.buffer_disabled: Diff สด: ปิดใช้งานสำหรับบัฟเฟอร์นี้
th.status.mode_head: Diff สด: กำลังเปรียบเทียบกับ HEAD
th.status.mode_disk: Diff สด: กำลังเปรียบเทียบกับไฟล์บนดิสก์

th.status.default_set: Diff สด: อัปเดตโหมดเริ่มต้นแล้ว

uk.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Увімкнути або вимкнути живий diff глобально для всіх буферів
uk.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Увімкнути або вимкнути живий diff для поточного буфера (замінює глобальне налаштування)

uk.status.buffer_disabled: Живий Diff: вимкнено для цього буфера

vi.cmd.toggle_global_desc: Bật hoặc tắt diff trực tiếp toàn cục cho tất cả các buffer
vi.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: Bật hoặc tắt diff trực tiếp cho buffer hiện tại (ghi đè cài đặt toàn cục)
vi.cmd.vs_head: Diff trực tiếp: so với HEAD

vi.cmd.vs_branch: Diff trực tiếp: so với nhánh...

vi.cmd.set_default_desc: Đặt chế độ diff mặc định cho buffer mới (head, disk hoặc branch:<ref>)
vi.prompt.default_mode: Chế độ mặc định (head, disk hoặc branch:<ref>)
vi.status.no_file: Diff trực tiếp: Không có tệp mở
vi.status.global_enabled: Diff trực tiếp: đã bật toàn cục
vi.status.global_disabled: Diff trực tiếp: đã tắt toàn cục
vi.status.buffer_enabled: Diff trực tiếp: đã bật cho buffer này
vi.status.buffer_disabled: Diff trực tiếp: đã tắt cho buffer này
vi.status.mode_head: Diff trực tiếp: đang so sánh với HEAD
vi.status.mode_disk: Diff trực tiếp: đang so sánh với tệp trên đĩa
vi.status.mode_branch: Diff trực tiếp: đang so sánh với %{ref}
vi.status.refreshed: Diff trực tiếp: đã làm mới tham chiếu
vi.status.too_large: Diff trực tiếp: tệp quá lớn để diff trực tiếp
vi.status.bad_default: Diff trực tiếp: chế độ không hợp lệ (sử dụng head, disk hoặc branch:<ref>)
vi.status.default_set: Diff trực tiếp: đã cập nhật chế độ mặc định

zh-CN.cmd.toggle_global: 实时 Diff: 切换 (全局)
zh-CN.cmd.toggle_global_desc: 为所有缓冲区全局启用或禁用实时 diff
zh-CN.cmd.toggle_buffer: 实时 Diff: 切换 (缓冲区)
zh-CN.cmd.toggle_buffer_desc: 为当前缓冲区启用或禁用实时 diff (覆盖全局设置)
zh-CN.cmd.vs_head: 实时 Diff: 对比 HEAD
zh-CN.cmd.vs_head_desc: 将此缓冲区与 git HEAD 中的文件进行对比
zh-CN.cmd.vs_disk: 实时 Diff: 对比磁盘 (未保存的更改)
zh-CN.cmd.vs_disk_desc: 将此缓冲区与磁盘上当前的文件内容进行对比
zh-CN.cmd.vs_branch: 实时 Diff: 对比分支...
zh-CN.cmd.vs_branch_desc: 将此缓冲区与所选 git 分支或引用中的文件进行对比
zh-CN.cmd.vs_default_branch: 实时 Diff: 对比默认分支
zh-CN.cmd.vs_default_branch_desc: 将此缓冲区与 origin/HEAD 对比 (回退到 main，再到 master)
zh-CN.cmd.refresh_desc: 重新获取参照并重算当前缓冲区的 diff
zh-CN.cmd.set_default: 实时 Diff: 设置默认模式...
zh-CN.cmd.set_default_desc: 为新缓冲区设置默认 diff 模式 (head、disk 或 branch:<ref>)
zh-CN.status.no_file: 实时 Diff: 没有打开的文件
zh-CN.status.global_enabled: 实时 Diff: 已全局启用
zh-CN.status.global_disabled: 实时 Diff: 已全局禁用
zh-CN.status.buffer_enabled: 实时 Diff: 已为此缓冲区启用
zh-CN.status.buffer_disabled: 实时 Diff: 已为此缓冲区禁用
zh-CN.status.mode_head: 实时 Diff: 正在与 HEAD 对比
zh-CN.status.mode_disk: 实时 Diff: 正在与磁盘上的文件对比
zh-CN.status.mode_branch: 实时 Diff: 正在与 %{ref} 对比
zh-CN.status.refreshed: 实时 Diff: 参照已刷新
zh-CN.status.too_large: 实时 Diff: 文件过大，无法进行实时 diff
zh-CN.status.bad_default: 实时 Diff: 模式无效 (使用 head、disk 或 branch:<ref>)
zh-CN.status.default_set: 实时 Diff: 默认模式已更新
